content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is mildly positive with sector rotation into Pharma (+2.4%), IT (+1.7%), Metal (+1.6%), and Energy (+1.3%). Bank Nifty is the laggard. India VIX cooling to 19. Book is already 54% deployed across 8 names; priority is managing existing positions, not chasing more. Several existing trades are sitting at small gains where SL trails are appropriate per the trailing mandate.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 78.00,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent; SL & target already aligned with thesis. Stock recovered intraday to 79.20, PSU bank Q4 results strong (PAT +35% YoY), TP 88-90 from brokerages. Keep existing levels — no MODIFY actually needed; treating as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position up +6.4%. Per trailing mandate (≥4% gain), trail SL up to lock in gains. Tightening SL from 1025.03 to 1030 keeps risk minimal while leaving room for normal pullback to support at 1040. Target 1100 (52w high zone) intact; thesis (Q4 beat, GNPA <1%) still valid."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Flat position (-0.4%). VIX easing limits flight-to-safety; gold consolidating near record highs. SL at 119 (5%) is appropriate hedge size. No change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%, just above breakeven SL. Stock at 52w high after strong Q4 print. Keeping SL at breakeven 1418 (already tight); trimming target to 1465 (more realistic R1 zone given overbought RSI/BB upper at 1430). Will trail tighter as stock advances."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 685.00,
      "new_target": 720.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 3,
      "reasoning": "Stock made 52w high 710 then sold off to 694; current SL 694.48 is already above CMP — likely to trigger immediately. Loosening risk profile is forbidden, but 694.48 SL is essentially breakeven trigger and may auto-stop out. Lowering to 685 would loosen — NOT allowed. Keeping SL where it is by tightening a hair is impractical. CORRECTION: cannot loosen SL. Will EXIT instead given Q4 results 2 days away (Apr 29) — event risk + SL very tight = unfavorable. See exit decision below."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 70,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Booking +2% gain ahead of Q4FY26 earnings on Apr 29 (binary event in 2 days). Stock made shooting-star-like reversal from 710 to 694 today; current SL 694.48 sits at CMP and will trigger anyway. Better to lock in profit cleanly than risk overnight gap on FDA Form 483 overhang + earnings. R/R into event unfavorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.7%, SL at 2260 (4.7% below entry). Q4 results in 3 days (Apr 30) is binary event. Stock above key support 2316 intraday. Holding through event with defined risk; not adding. SL stays as is."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, broke out to fresh 52w high (414). Per trailing mandate (≥+2% with SL still at entry), moving SL slightly above breakeven to 405 to lock in small gain. Target 425 intact. Power sector momentum + heatwave demand thesis playing out."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%, SL 850 (3.2% below entry). Bearish research note flags FY26 PAT -65%, SFIO probe — but Q4 NII +43% and Jefferies upgrade provide near-term support. Keeping tight SL; not adding. Will reassess if breaks 870 support."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already have a working OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 320.50 placed 6 hours ago. CMP 323 has run above limit; setup remains valid. Per ORDER HYGIENE rules, NOT stacking a second order. Letting existing limit work; if it doesn't fill by EOD will reassess."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 612 still working. No data update suggests changing it; letting it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 443 still working. Power cluster already heavily represented (NTPC held + POWERGRID pending). Caution: if both POWERGRID and TATAPOWER fill alongside NTPC, energy/power cluster exposure approaches the 20% cluster guideline. Not adding more; letting existing limit work but this is the cap."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 78.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, recovering intraday. SL at 78 is 4% below entry — appropriate. Hold for momentum continuation toward 85."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Up +6.4%; trail SL to 1030 to lock in ~4.7% gain while leaving room above intraday low 1040."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive holding; thesis (geopolitical + central bank buying) intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven; stock at 52w high. Let it run with existing risk parameters."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Exit before Apr 29 earnings event; book +2% rather than risk overnight gap with SL already at CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "Holding through Apr 30 results with defined risk. Recent accumulation signals (delivery +47%, OI surge) constructive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.7% with breakout to 52w high. Trail SL just above entry to lock in small gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 850.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal P&L; mixed thesis. SL provides defined risk; no action until trend clarifies."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SUNPHARMA, M&MFIN, HSCL flagged as interesting but NOT entering today: (1) book already 54% deployed; (2) cluster discipline — too many simultaneous breakout entries; (3) HSCL up 23% in 4 sessions, parabolic and overbought; (4) M&MFIN gap-up +8% is chase territory. Will revisit on pullbacks. AXISBANK avoiding — weak Q4, falling knife.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 54% deployed across 8 names — adequate diversification (PSU bank, HFC, gold ETF, FMCG x2, pharma, power, private bank). Three pending orders (POWERGRID, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) if all fill would push deployment to ~75%, near max. Power cluster (NTPC held + POWERGRID + TATAPOWER pending) approaching 20% cluster threshold — no further power adds. Two binary earnings events in 2-3 days (GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) — exiting GRANULES, holding HUL with defined SL. Trailing SLs activated on NTPC and PNBHOUSING per mandate. Win rate at 5% (1W/2L of 20) is concerning but small sample; profit factor 1.4x is acceptable. Disciplined exits and tight risk control remain the priority."
}
